title: Dashboard Walkthrough
description: Template: walk through a dashboard with tabs, charts and tables

steps.title: Introduce dashboard
steps.narration: Welcome to the dashboard. This is the central hub of the application.

steps.title: Describe overview
steps.narration: The overview tab shows key metrics and recent activity at a glance.

steps.title: Describe analytics
steps.narration: The analytics section provides detailed charts and trends over time.

steps.title: Describe tables
steps.narration: Below the charts, detailed data tables allow filtering and export.
